query:
SELECT 
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  e.shift,
  DATE_FORMAT(rd.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
INNER JOIN request_dates rd ON rdd.request_id = rd.request_id AND DATE(rdd.date) = DATE(rd.date)
INNER JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
INNER JOIN employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id
WHERE rdd.decision = 'approved'
  AND rd.date >= '2026-06-01'
  AND rd.date <= '2026-12-31'
  AND r.status != 'withdrawn'
  AND r.request_type = 'vacation'
  AND e.is_active = true
  AND COALESCE(e.category, 'icu') != 'ancillary'
  AND e.role != 'ancillary'
ORDER BY e.shift, e.last_name, e.first_name, rd.date
